name: Pure Kashmiri Mongra Kesar (Saffron) — Grade A++
subtitle: The World's Finest Saffron Stigmas — 100% Pure Kashmiri Kesar
heroSubline: Handpicked from the sun-drenched fields of Pampore, our Mongra kesar represents the pinnacle of purity and potency. Only the deep crimson tips are selected for our royal collection.
description: 100% pure Kashmiri Mongra kesar, handpicked from Pampore. GI-tagged, farm-direct, Grade A++ Mongra known for its high crocin colouring strength. Available in 1g, 2g, 5g, 10g, 20g, 30g and 50g packs. Trusted by thousands of Indian families for cooking, kesar milk and pregnancy.
description2: Each strand of our kashmiri saffron is hand-separated and sun-dried using traditional methods passed down through generations. Perfect for biryani, kesar milk, pregnancy nutrition, traditional Ayurvedic use, and ceremonial rituals.
